---
title: "Fear"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2010). Fear. *Now Then*."
date: "2010-11-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_fear_2010"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Now Then"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-33/fear/ http://ubuntuone.com/p/1FBX/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "Money, staffies, and the apocalypse"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Now Then
**Year:** 2010

[URL](http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-33/fear/ http://ubuntuone.com/p/1FBX/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

Money, staffies, and the apocalypse

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2010). Fear. *Now Then*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_fear_2010,
	title = {Fear},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-33/fear/ http://ubuntuone.com/p/1FBX/},
	abstract = {Money, staffies, and the apocalypse},
	journal = {Now Then},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = nov,
	year = {2010},
	pages = {22--23},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
